title: 6x Perfect Scents Hanging Dehumidifier Scented - 180g (Fresh Linen)
features: Add a refreshing scent to any room with this 6x Perfect Scents Hanging Dehumidifier. Designed to keep your living space smelling fresh and dry, this dehumidifier is perfect for those who love to keep their home comfortable and healthy.

With a weight of only 180g, it is easy to hang anywhere in your room and let it work its magic. This hanging dehumidifier is perfect for anyone looking to add a touch of fragrance to their home decor. Its scented feature allows you to choose your favourite scent, making it a great addition to any room.
Whether you're looking to keep your home smelling fresh or simply want to add a touch of fragrance to your living space, this dehumidifier is the perfect choice.
